description: Routing check: One-line flag + isolation check at top of `executeParallelDispatch()`. If `COMPOSE_SERVER_DISPATCH=1` AND `isolation: "none"`, routes to server executor; else routes to existing consumer executor. Routing logic validated in 6 tests covering flag states, isolation modes, and default behavior.
phase: T2-F5-COMPOSE-MIGRATE: Server-Side Dispatch for All Parallel Steps
